impact: This advances the PP&D plan by defining human-reviewable, source-backed change report outputs before any live crawl or authenticated automation, supporting Phase 3 change monitoring for guidance updates.
summary: Added deterministic source-diff report artifacts for changed PP&D guidance pages.
target_task: Task checkbox-16: Add source diff report artifacts for changed PP&D guidance pages.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
